ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the generator */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the generator (e.g., nuclear, thermal, solar, wind) */,
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus where the generator is connected */,
  "max_power" INTEGER /* Maximum power output of the generator */,
  "min_power" INTEGER /* Minimum power output of the generator */,
  "max_ramp_up" INTEGER /* Maximum ramp-up rate of the generator */,
  "max_ramp_down" INTEGER /* Maximum ramp-down rate of the generator */,
  "min_up_time" INTEGER /* Minimum up time of the generator */,
  "min_down_time" INTEGER /* Minimum down time of the generator */,
  "marginal_cost" REAL /* Marginal cost of power generation */,
  "shut_down_cost" REAL /* Shut-down cost of the generator */,
  "start_cost" REAL /* Start-up cost of the generator */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the generator location */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the generator location */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage at the bus */,
  "capacity_factor" REAL /* Capacity factor of the generator */,
  "operating_status" TEXT /* Operating status of the generator (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the generator */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date of the generator */,
  "operating_hours" INTEGER /* Total operating hours of the generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generators_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES generator_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generators_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buses" (
  "bus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the bus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bus */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage at the bus */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency at the bus */,
  "load" REAL /* Load at the bus */,
  "generation" REAL /* Generation at the bus */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the bus data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generator_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generator type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the generator type (e.g., nuclear, thermal, solar, wind) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generator type */,
  "average_efficiency" REAL /* Average efficiency of the generator type */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Description of the environmental impact of the generator type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_generation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "power_output" REAL /* Power output at the time of the log entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the generator (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency at the time of the log entry */,
  "load" REAL /* Load at the time of the log entry */,
  "environmental_metrics" TEXT /* Environmental metrics at the time of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_generation_logs_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the maintenance */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the maintenance schedule was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost metric */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "marginal_cost" REAL /* Marginal cost of power generation */,
  "shut_down_cost" REAL /* Shut-down cost of the generator */,
  "start_cost" REAL /* Start-up cost of the generator */,
  "total_operating_cost" REAL /* Total operating cost of the generator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the cost metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_metrics_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generation_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted power generation value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the forecast was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_forecasts_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Last action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., operator, maintenance staff, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, action) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of the alarm (e.g., overvoltage, undervoltage, overfrequency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alarm */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alarm has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolved_timestamp" TEXT /* When the alarm was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid condition */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the condition */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the grid */,
  "total_load" REAL /* Total load on the grid */,
  "total_generation" REAL /* Total generation on the grid */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the grid */,
  "load_factor" REAL /* Load factor of the grid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the grid conditions were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power flow */,
  "from_bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus where power is flowing from */,
  "to_bus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bus where power is flowing to */,
  "power_mw" REAL /* Power flow in MW */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the power flow */,
  "line_loss" REAL /* Line loss between buses */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the power flow was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_flow_to_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_flow_from_bus_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_bus_id") REFERENCES buses ("bus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., outage, maintenance, system test) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the event was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in kg */,
  "so2_emissions" REAL /* SO2 emissions in kg */,
  "nox_emissions" REAL /* NOx emissions in kg */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the environmental metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generator */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the generator */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the generator */,
  "availability" REAL /* Availability of the generator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the performance metrics were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_generator_id FOREIGN KEY ("generator_id") REFERENCES generators ("generator_id")
)
